competitors.name: AppOmni
competitors.notes: Primary SSPM competitor — watch for partner announcements, new use case positioning, and marketplace listings

competitors.name: Reco.AI
competitors.notes: SaaS identity and integration risk — watch for partner motions and product expansion

competitors.name: CrowdStrike
competitors.notes: Falcon Shield (formerly Adaptive Shield) — watch for SaaS/identity threat detection positioning and VAR partner announcements

competitors.name: Microsoft Defender
competitors.notes: Defender for Cloud Apps / SaaS security — watch for Copilot security and CASB positioning

competitors.name: Grip Security
competitors.notes: Shadow SaaS discovery and SaaS identity — watch for partner and marketplace motions

competitors.name: Valence Security
competitors.notes: SaaS-to-SaaS integration risk and OAuth — watch for product and partner announcements

competitors.name: Nudge Security
competitors.notes: Shadow SaaS discovery and GenAI governance — watch for enterprise push and channel motions

competitors.name: SafeBase / Drata
competitors.notes: SafeBase acquired by Drata — watch for SaaS compliance and audit positioning overlap

competitors.name: Lumos
competitors.notes: Shadow SaaS and identity governance — watch for IGA/IAM expansion and enterprise channel moves

partners.name: Optiv
partners.notes: Tier 1 national VAR — FSI and F500 focus. Watch for new vendor additions, joint events, and co-marketing

partners.name: GuidePoint Security
partners.notes: Mid-market to enterprise VAR — watch for identity/SaaS security focus areas and new vendor partnerships

partners.name: Trace3
partners.notes: Enterprise VAR — cloud and security practice. Watch for SaaS and identity security vendor additions

partners.name: WWT
partners.notes: Enterprise VAR — federal and healthcare focus. Watch for cloud security practice announcements

partners.name: EverSec
partners.notes: MSSP — deep Obsidian expertise. Watch for new vendor relationships and service offerings. Domain moved from eversecsecurity.com to eversecgroup.com

partners.name: Myriad360
partners.notes: Mid-market VAR — cloud and security focus. Watch for new vendor partnerships

partners.name: SHI
partners.notes: Large national VAR — watch for SaaS security and identity vendor additions at scale

partners.name: CDW
partners.notes: Large national VAR — watch for SaaS and cloud security vendor additions and co-marketing

marketplaces.name: AWS Marketplace
marketplaces.notes: Track competitor marketplace listings and co-sell announcements

marketplaces.name: Microsoft Azure Marketplace
marketplaces.notes: Azure co-sell motions for security vendors

linkedin_rss.notes: RSS.app bundle — GuidePoint Security, Trace3, WWT, Optiv, SHI, AppOmni, Reco, CrowdStrike, Valence Security, Grip Security

channel_news_sources.notes: #1 for partner moves, MDF programs, vendor-VAR stories, and preferred vendor announcements

channel_news_sources.notes: VAR and MSSP channel news — new alliances and vendor programs

channel_news_sources.notes: MSP and MSSP channel coverage — vendor partner program changes

channel_news_sources.notes: MSSP-specific news — relevant for EverSec and partner MSSP motions
